items.title: Heat guarantee Dru Smith's salary for 2026-27 as personnel deadlines hit. www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/29/h... Not only is Smith’s $2.6 million salary now on the Heat’s 2026-27 books, but the Heat also hold a team option on Smith at $2.9 million for 2027-28.
items.author: Ira Winderman
items.body_excerpt: Heat guarantee Dru Smith's salary for 2026-27 as personnel deadlines hit. www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/29/h... Not only is Smith’s $2.6 million salary now on the Heat’s 2026-27 books, but the Heat also hold a team option on Smith at $2.9 million for 2027-28.

media.title: Heat guarantee Dru Smith’s salary for 2026-27 as personnel deadlines hit
media.description: In the wake of sending out Tyler Herro and Kasparas Jakucionis in the trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo, the Miami Heat made the logical follow-up by guaranteeing Dru Smith’s 2026-27 salary.
